prompts.story: Create an engaging Instagram story about {{topic}}
prompts.post: Write an Instagram post for {{topic}} with relevant hashtags
prompts.reel: Create a fun Instagram Reel script about {{topic}}
prompts.caption: Write a compelling Instagram caption for this {{contentType}}

tips: Engage with your audience through comments and DMs
Use Instagram Stories for behind-the-scenes content
Collaborate with influencers and other accounts
Use location tags to increase local visibility

formats.question: What's your favorite {{topic}}? Drop a comment below! 👇 #{{hashtag}}
formats.tip: 💡 Pro tip: {{tip}} Save this post for later! #Tips #{{category}}
formats.behind_scenes: Behind the scenes: {{description}} Love seeing the process! #BTS #{{project}}
formats.user_generated: Amazing shot by {{user}}! Thanks for tagging us 📸 #UGC #Community

prompts.post: Create a Facebook post about {{topic}} that encourages discussion
prompts.event: Write a Facebook event description for {{event}}
prompts.group: Create a Facebook group post about {{topic}}
prompts.page: Write a Facebook page post promoting {{product}}

engagement.question: What do you think about {{topic}}? We'd love to hear your thoughts in the comments!
engagement.poll: Help us decide: {{option1}} or {{option2}}? Vote in the comments!
engagement.share: Share this post if you {{action}}! Let's spread the word.
engagement.tag: Tag someone who needs to see this! 👇

tips: Post when your audience is most active
Use Facebook Groups to build community

formats.announcement: 📢 Exciting news! {{announcement}} What are your thoughts? #{{topic}}
formats.educational: 📚 Did you know: {{fact}} Share your experience with this! #Education #{{subject}}
formats.community: 💬 Community question: {{question}} Let's discuss in the comments! #Community
formats.promotional: 🎉 Special offer: {{offer}} Don't miss out! Link in comments. #Sale #{{product}}

prompts.reply: Create a thoughtful reply to this tweet about {{topic}}
prompts.quote: Quote tweet this with your thoughts on {{topic}}

engagement.question: Quick question: {{question}} Drop your thoughts below! 👇
engagement.retweet: RT if you agree with this: {{statement}}

tips: Engage with trending topics when relevant
Use Twitter threads for longer content
Retweet and comment on relevant content

formats.hot_take: 🔥 Hot take: {{opinion}} What do you think? #{{topic}}
formats.tip: 💡 Quick tip: {{tip}} Have you tried this? #{{category}}
formats.question: 🤔 {{question}} Let me know your thoughts! #{{topic}}

prompts.post: Write a professional LinkedIn post about {{topic}}
prompts.article: Create a LinkedIn article about {{industry}} trends

professional.insight: In my experience with {{field}}, I've learned that {{insight}}. What has been your experience?
professional.achievement: Excited to share that {{achievement}}! Grateful for the journey and the people who supported me.
professional.industry: The {{industry}} industry is evolving rapidly. Here are {{number}} trends I'm watching:
professional.lesson: Key lesson from {{experience}}: {{lesson}}. What lessons have shaped your career?

tips: Share professional insights and industry news

formats.insight: 💼 Professional insight: {{insight}} What's your take on this? #{{industry}}
formats.achievement: 🎉 Proud to announce: {{achievement}} Thank you to everyone who supported me! #Career
formats.tip: 💡 Career tip: {{tip}} This has made a difference in my journey. #ProfessionalDevelopment
formats.industry: 📈 {{industry}} update: {{news}} How is this impacting your work? #{{industry}}

prompts.video: Create a TikTok video script about {{topic}}
prompts.trend: Jump on this trending sound with content about {{topic}}

trends.dance: Create a dance video using the trending {{song}}
